file_name: Questionnaire - Estia Health - Norsan residential aged care business.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition. Are Estia and Norsan close competitors and what alternatives are available?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Estia and/or Norsan.
